name: Forum
description: Discussion forum: categories/boards, topics, and self-threaded replies -- a faithful port of a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo. Public read on all three collections; owner writes their own categories/topics/replies (row_filter owner_id=$user_id) -- v1 has no separate moderator queue, matching the source: moderation is the flags themselves (is_pinned/is_locked/is_solved on a topic, is_solution on a reply) plus who may set them. Topic permalinks need a site_routes record mapping /forum/topics/{topic_id:uuid} to site_forum_topic -- not seeded by this package, same precedent as app-notes' /notes/{note_id:uuid}. Deferred to a later slice (fields are carried, behavior is not): AI topic summaries (ai_summary/is_ai_summarized were written by a scheduled job in the source system; no generation is built here), topic view-count incrementing (views exists; nothing increments it -- that is a UI page-load concern), cross-user moderation (an admin/moderator pinning, locking, or marking someone else's topic/reply -- needs a moderator-role permission rule this package does not define), and category slug auto-generation (slug is a plain field, not derived from name).
